title: Clippy: 9 needless raw string hashes — remove unneeded # from r#""#
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

**Dimension:** Cognitive Readability
**Lint:** clippy::needless_raw_string_hashes

## Violation
Raw-string hashes `r#"..."#` are present without any `"` inside the string. A plain `r"..."` would suffice — the hashes are noise.

## Locations
- src/claude_credentials.rs: 416
- src/plugins/mod.rs: 1569, 1590, 1642
- src/tool_intercept.rs: 847, 870, 889, 909, 939

## Mandated Refactor
Drop the `#`:
```rust
// Before
let s = r#"some text without embedded quotes"#;
// After
let s = r"some text without embedded quotes";
```
Auto-fix with `cargo clippy --fix -- -W clippy::needless_raw_string_hashes`. Verify no later edit adds quotes requiring hashes again.
